title: Self-Standing Bioinspired Polymer Films Doped with Ultrafine Silver Nanoparticles as Innovative Antimicrobial Material

L2: IJMS 2022 Best Graphic Abstract Award winner
Self-standing antimicrobial films with ultrafine ~25nm silver nanophases
L3: Award-winning graphical abstract showing green chemical synthesis of self-standing polymer films doped with ultrafine silver nanoparticles (~25nm). Antimicrobial composite material produced by overnight thermal treatment. Demonstrates synergistic antimicrobial activity. CC BY 4.0 license.
